stories.headline: Four central banks decide rates this week, with FOMC the main event for crypto
stories.tldr: Bank of Japan, Federal Reserve, ECB and Bank of England all set rate policy this week, with markets pricing zero Fed cuts.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A simultaneous hawkish surprise from any of the four would yank dollar liquidity and cap the BTC rebound just as it threatens $80K resistance.
the_details: Markets price 3.50%-3.75% as the most likely Fed hold, with no cut expected at the FOMC decision midweek.
BoJ kicks off the week of decisions, followed by the Fed, ECB and BoE in rapid succession.
BTC pinned near $78,100 and ETH near $2,328 ahead of the prints, both holding key supports.

stories.headline: Strategy adds 3,273 BTC, now holds 818,334 BTC en route to 1M target
stories.tldr: Michael Saylor's Strategy bought 3,273 more BTC, pushing its treasury to 818,334 coins acquired for roughly $62B at $75,537 average.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Persistent corporate bid below $80K is mopping up the supply that's keeping BTC range-bound and shrinks the float available for spot ETFs.
the_details: Strategy's stack of 818,334 BTC is now within 22% of its publicly stated 1 million BTC target.
Average cost basis sits at $75,537 — roughly 3% in the money against a $78K spot price.
Bitmine separately bought $236M of ether as Tom Lee branded ETH a 'wartime store of value'.

stories.headline: 100+ crypto firms push Senate to mark up CLARITY Act before summer recess
stories.tldr: A coalition led by Coinbase and Ripple is pressuring the Senate Banking Committee to mark up the CLARITY Act and finally split SEC and CFTC jurisdiction.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A markup would cement the SEC-CFTC token taxonomy from March's joint guidance into law and unlock a wave of US-based DeFi launches that have been waiting on rules.
the_details: More than 100 firms signed the April 23 letter urging committee action this session.
The bill would codify the five-bucket taxonomy (commodities, collectibles, tools, stablecoins, securities) issued by SEC-CFTC on March 17.
It builds on the SEC's April 13 statement clearing DEX front-end operators from broker-dealer registration.

stories.headline: Spot Solana ETF inflows collapse 92% from November peak as DeFi confidence cracks
stories.tldr: Spot SOL ETF inflows fell from $419M in November 2025 to just $34M in April 2026 as Drift's $285M exploit dented Solana DeFi appetite.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: The 92% drop signals institutional demand is concentrating in BTC and ETH products, leaving altcoin ETF launches with much less than issuers projected.
the_details: SOL trades near $86.47 with a $49.8B market cap, ranking seventh by market value.
Drift's April 1 exploit drained $270M+ via Solana's 'durable nonces' feature, suspected to be North Korean-affiliated.
Multiple US spot SOL ETF filings remain pending with no approval timeline confirmed.

stories.headline: TOKEN2049 Dubai postponed to 2027 amid heightened UAE security risks
stories.tldr: Organizers pushed TOKEN2049 Dubai out to 2027, citing heightened security risks across the UAE that made hosting in 2026 untenable.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: One of crypto's biggest annual gatherings going dark in the Gulf shifts deal-making energy back to Singapore and pulls forward sponsor dollars to other 2026 events.
the_details: TOKEN2049 Dubai is the largest Gulf-region crypto conference and a key venue for Middle East fund LPs.
Organizers cited heightened security risks across the UAE as the trigger for the postponement.
TOKEN2049 Singapore remains on the 2026 calendar and is expected to absorb displaced sponsorships.
